title: Ceratostema calycinum
taxonomy: Ceratostema calycinum is classified within the family Gesneriaceae, which comprises about 140 genera of flowering plants. This family is often referred to as the African violet family due to its diverse range of species. intro: Ceratostema calycinum, also known as Iresine or Bloodleaf, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Iresinaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, fever, and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Ceratostema calycinum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
